# ProSaaS

> ProSaaS is an AI-powered CRM, WhatsApp automation and voice bot platform for businesses in Israel.

## About

ProSaaS connects CRM, WhatsApp and AI phone calls into one smart system that manages, records and converts customer inquiries automatically — 24/7, without missing a single lead.

## Products

- **AI Voice Bot** — Real-time natural Hebrew phone answering, transcription, summaries and CRM logging
- **WhatsApp Bot** — Automatic 24/7 replies, lead qualification and agent handoff
- **Smart CRM** — Full customer management with call history, tags, pipeline and task tracking
- **Sales Pipeline** — Lead statuses, follow-ups and meeting scheduling
- **Dashboards** — Inquiry volume, response times and conversion analytics
- **Integrations** — Webhooks, API, n8n, Twilio, WhatsApp Business API

## Target Audience

Small and medium businesses in Israel that need automated customer communication: dental clinics, real estate, law firms, moving companies, cleaning services, property management and more.

## Pricing

- Starter: ₪600/month
- Business: ₪1,500/month
- Enterprise: custom pricing
